# Requirements Quality Checklist: Register User Account Use Case

**Purpose**: Validate completeness, clarity, and consistency of the registration requirements.
**Created**: 2026-02-09
**Feature**: /home/aiden/ECE_493_Lab_2/specs/001-register-user-account/spec.md

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are requirements defined for all input fields expected on the registration form (email, password, role, and any other required fields)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 Are requirements stated for how user roles are selected or validated during registration? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements included for handling storage failures when creating a new account? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK004 Are requirements defined for duplicate submission handling (e.g., double-submit) beyond the edge case note? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK005 Are requirements specified for where and how registration outcomes are recorded for traceability? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK006 Is the term "register user account" defined with specific data captured and validation rules? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK007 Is "password security standards" quantified with explicit criteria? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK008 Are "clear, actionable error messages" defined with minimum content or format expectations? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK009 Is the success outcome "new user record stored" specified with required fields and persistence expectations? [Clarity, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK010 Do acceptance scenarios align with functional requirements for validation and error handling? [Consistency, Spec §FR-002, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK011 Do edge cases correspond to explicit requirements rather than remaining only as questions? [Consistency, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK012 Are success criteria measurable without referencing implementation details? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK013 Are time-based success criteria consistent with the scope described in the requirements (single-user demo vs. general user base)? [Consistency, Spec §SC-001, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK014 Are acceptance scenarios complete for all validation failure types (invalid email, duplicate email, weak password)? [Coverage, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK015 Are alternate flows for rejected registrations fully specified beyond a single example? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK016 Are recovery actions defined after a validation failure (e.g., what the user can correct and retry)? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 2]
- [ ] CHK017 Are exception flows for storage failures or unavailable services specified? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK018 Are edge cases written as concrete requirements rather than open questions? [Ambiguity, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK019 Are boundary conditions defined for email format validation (e.g., accepted formats)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK020 Are boundary conditions defined for password validation (length, character classes)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK021 Are performance expectations for registration specified in the requirements (not just the plan)? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK022 Are accessibility requirements for the registration form defined (keyboard, labels, error announcements)? [Gap]
- [ ] CHK023 Are privacy or data handling requirements specified for user credentials and stored data? [Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK024 Are assumptions about missing password standards explicitly tracked with a resolution path? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK025 Are dependencies on external requirement artifacts (use cases, scenarios, acceptance tests) explicitly mapped? [Traceability, Spec §User Scenarios & Testing]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK026 Is the required role assignment during registration unambiguous and consistent across scenarios and requirements? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK027 Are there any conflicting statements between acceptance scenarios and functional requirements about success messaging or redirects? [Conflict, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §FR-004]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
